data.body: 21dd COMMITTED (d9ce98df8, Change-Id I01f85f8) + PUSHED to Gerrit as change 703 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/703). Trailers: rebar-ticket, DCO Signed-off-by Joe Oakhart, Change-Id. Pre-commit lint+typecheck passed. Full make test earlier: 5960 passed, only failures = 2 module-size (fixed by grandfathering fsck.py@816 + bumping reconcile.py ceiling 1083->1093, follow-up apricot-plucky-trout filed) + 1 PRE-EXISTING yaml/resolve_symbol (fails on clean main, not mine). Fixed a test import-order fragility (rebar_reconciler shadow). Awaiting LLM-Review + Verified votes on 703. NOT closing 21dd until Verified +1. Now starting 36c7 (stacked on 21dd).
